title: NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSE SENIOR SERVICES - 211info
text: NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSE MAIN OFFICE NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSE SENIOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include specialized information and assistance, transportation scheduling, and wellness programs that includes foot care. 8959 SW Barbur Boulevard Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Age 55 and older Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-3:30pm Email (541) 246-1663 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 246-1663 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Appointment required for foot care. FEES: Varies by service. Donations accepted for recreational, nutrition, and shopping transportation. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Russian, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Senior Ride Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Older Adult/Aging Issues Wellness Programs * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSE FOOD - FOOD SECURITY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
